meta.title: Christopher Thorne - English Teacher for Japanese students
meta.description: English teaching for Japanese students - conversation and comprehension with a UK-based tutor fluent in Japanese (JLPT N1).

hero.name: Christopher Thorne
hero.subtitle: English Teacher for Japanese students
hero.intro1: Hi, I'm Chris! I offer English teaching to Japanese students who want to improve their speaking and comprehension.
hero.intro2: I'm based in the UK, but spent a year living in Kyoto in 2014 and have been learning Japanese ever since. I hold JLPT N1 and am fluent. As someone who has reached fluency in a second language myself, I understand the challenges along the way and can share practical tips and strategies to help you master English.

services.label: Services
services.heading: What we can work on
services.lead: Focused sessions tailored to your goals, whether casual conversation or exam preparation.

goals.0: Speaking with more confidence in everyday conversation
goals.1: Understanding native-speed English in films, podcasts, and meetings
goals.2: Building vocabulary for work, travel, or study abroad
goals.3: Preparing for interviews, presentations, or English exams
goals.4: Improving pronunciation and sounding more natural

pricing.label: Plans
pricing.heading: Pricing
pricing.lead: Choose a plan that fits your schedule and ambitions. All rates are per hour.

items.0: Work towards language qualifications (EIKEN, TOEIC, IELTS, TOEFL)
Prepare for a professional event in English
items.2: Master pronunciation so you can be understood clearly
items.3: Use native-level phrasing and vocabulary to leave a strong impression

about.label: Background
about.heading: About me
about.p1: I have a long-standing passion for language learning. I started studying Japanese in 2010 and was comfortable in conversation by 2014, thanks to regular speaking practice with native speakers and consistent self-study at home. I am also fluent in French.
about.p2: I am a strong advocate of spaced repetition - particularly through the Anki app - and of immersion: finding books, films, podcasts, or hobbies you genuinely enjoy in the language you are learning is the best way to stay motivated over the long term.
about.p3: Outside of teaching, I work as a software engineer. You can see my professional background on LinkedIn.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.lead: Interested in lessons or have a question? I'd be happy to hear from you.
